race.description: D & A Plumbing And Gas Hcp (Bm52+)
race.comment: SPACE ACADEMY (9) scored a good win two back at Belmont before disappointing when out in trip at Albany last time out. Back to 1500m today is a big tick and he looks very well placed at this level. Draw is the query but his win two back stacks right up. SKY RIVER (7) missed in a photo here two back before ending up 3.2L off the winner at Belmont last time out. She has enough speed to cross from a wide draw and Cheung's claim means she'll carry no weight. Can play a leading role. WHO SAZ YES (10) will be fitter for his last start off a short break and the rise to 1500m is a big tick. This is easier than what she took on last time out and she rates highly on her recent form. CARAWAY (3) boasts a good second-up record and should get her chance from the inside draw. ROMMEL'S JEUNEY (11) is next best off a gutsy all-the-way win las time out.
